name: auto_claim_intake_summary
description: extract auto insurance first notice of loss details and tool outcomes after each inbound ai assistant call

timestamp.description: date and time when the conversation ended, preferably iso 8601 if available

claim_intake_id.description: claim intake reference id returned by create_claim_intake, or blank if unavailable

fallback_reference_id.description: fallback reference id returned by log_claim_intake_fallback, or blank if unavailable

priority_task_id.description: priority task id returned by flag_priority_follow_up, or blank if not created

tool_status.description: one of created, fallback_logged, partial, failed, or unknown

caller_name.description: caller's full name, or blank if not provided

caller_phone.description: caller's callback phone number, preferably e.164 if available

caller_email.description: caller's email address, or blank if not provided

policy_number.description: policy number if provided, or blank if missing

loss_type.description: expected value is auto for this workflow

loss_date.description: date or approximate date of loss, or unknown

injuries_reported.description: yes, no, or unknown, with brief detail if provided

other_parties.description: other driver or party details if provided

preferred_follow_up_time.description: when the caller wants follow-up, or blank if not provided

priority_flag.description: true if the call should receive priority follow-up

priority_reasons.description: short reason codes or explanation for priority follow-up

handoff_reason.description: requested_human, emergency, unsupported_question, non_auto_or_misdirected, tool_failure, partial_information, or blank

unresolved_items.description: missing details, unanswered questions, or promised follow-up

summary.description: concise end-of-call summary for the claims team

telnyx_conversation_id.description: telnyx conversation id if present in webhook or insight payload

call_control_id.description: telnyx call control id if present in webhook or insight payload
